memory.project: Road Rage Runner — browser-based endless driving game
memory.tech: Next.js 14, TypeScript, HTML5 Canvas, Tailwind CSS, Vercel KV
key_files: CLAUDE.md — primary project spec and architecture
rules: Always read CLAUDE.md before starting any task
No magic numbers — use src/game/constants.ts for all values
Game logic in src/game/, React UI in src/components/ — never mix
Use useRef for game state in render loop, not useState
Canvas rendering must target 60fps on mobile
